# PERF-226 positive: make+copy of compress buffer Len/Bytes (P0.2 shape)
lang: go
file: PERF-226-vulnerable.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import "bytes"

func CompressAndOwn(page []byte) []byte {
	var compressedBuf bytes.Buffer
	compressedBuf.Write(page)
	// Own-then-copy after production — classic post-compress waste.
	cp := make([]byte, compressedBuf.Len())
	copy(cp, compressedBuf.Bytes())
	return cp
}
